title: Automate dropdown
excerpt: Hi - I’d like to be able to automate population of a dropdown based on a status change.  Specifically, when I change status to X, and I’d like Dropdown for that item to be updated to include A, B, and C tags.  Is this po…

posts.author: adamkovac (Adam Kovacevich)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi - I’d like to be able to automate population of a dropdown based on a status change. Specifically, when I change status to X, and I’d like Dropdown for that item to be updated to include A, B, and C tags. Is this possible?

posts.author: Jimmypenguin (Jimmy Lovett)
posts.cookedHtml: Same! I’d love to automate something along the lines of “If status is X then set dropdown to A”

posts.author: AlichiaS (Ali Sawitoski)
posts.cookedHtml: Seriously how is this still not possible? Especially if they’re going to limit Labels to 40 and force us to use Dropdowns when we need 41+ options.

posts.author: YashGarg (Yash Garg)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @adamkovac , @Jimmypenguin , @AlichiaS ,

We recently launched the app Special Automations - monday.com App Marketplace which has the required automation recipe for your use case.

image1874×216 19.7 KB

Also if you want any other automation, do let us know at support@superworkday.com

Thanks
